raw.text: Fix typo in npm install command in README

Add endpoint to fetch posts by user ID

Adds GET /users/{user_id}/posts endpoint to retrieve a user's posts
with a configurable limit (default: 20).

Refactor parse_date to use strptime

Replace manual date string parsing with datetime.strptime for cleaner,
more concise code.

Fix N+1 query in get_posts_with_authors

Replace per-post author lookup with a single batched query, reducing
database round-trips from N+1 to 2 regardless of post count.

Normalize whitespace in verify function

No functional changes.

Add tests for clamp edge cases

Cover the case where lo > hi raises ValueError, and verify that values
below the range are clamped to the lower bound.

Require MFA code for login

BREAKING CHANGE: `login()` now requires an `mfa_code` parameter.
All callers must be updated to pass the user's MFA code.

Document JWT authentication requirements

Add details on the required Authorization header format, token issuance
via POST /auth/login, and the 24-hour token expiration.
Fix typo in npm install command in README

Add endpoint to fetch posts by user ID

Exposes `GET /users/{user_id}/posts` with a configurable `limit`
(default 20) so clients can retrieve a user's posts without
filtering the full posts collection client-side.

Simplify parse_date using strptime

Replace manual split/int parsing with `datetime.strptime`. The
stdlib parser already validates the `YYYY-MM-DD` format and
raises `ValueError` on bad input, so the hand-rolled logic was
redundant.

Fix N+1 query in get_posts_with_authors

Previously fetched each post's author with a separate query,
producing N+1 round-trips. Now collect distinct author IDs and
load them in a single `WHERE id = ANY($1)` query, then join
in memory.
Normalize whitespace in verify()

Add tests for clamp edge cases

Cover the `lo > hi` validation error and the below-range
clamping behavior, which were previously untested.

Require MFA code for login

BREAKING CHANGE: `login()` now takes a mandatory `mfa_code`
argument. All callers must be updated to pass the user's
current MFA token; logins without MFA are no longer accepted.

Document JWT authentication requirements

Describe the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header, point
readers to `POST /auth/login` for token issuance, and note
the 24-hour expiry.
docs(readme): fix typo in install command
feat(api): add endpoint to list posts by user
refactor(utils): simplify parse_date using strptime
perf(posts): batch author lookup to avoid N+1 queries
style(auth): normalize whitespace in verify
test(clamp): cover invalid range and below-range inputs

feat(auth)!: require mfa_code parameter in login

BREAKING CHANGE: login() now requires an mfa_code argument; existing callers must supply the user's MFA code.
docs(api): document JWT authentication header and token lifetime
docs(readme): fix typo in npm install command
feat(api): add endpoint to fetch posts for a user

refactor(utils): use strptime for date parsing

Replaces manual split/int parsing with strptime, which handles
validation and conversion in a single call.

perf(posts): batch author lookup to avoid N+1 queries

Fetch all authors in a single query keyed by id instead of
issuing one query per post.
style(auth): normalize whitespace in verify
test(clamp): cover invalid bounds and below-range value
docs(api): document JWT authentication header and token lifetime
fix: correct `npm install` typo in README
feat(api): add endpoint to fetch posts for a user

refactor(utils): use strptime for date parsing

Replace manual split/int parsing with strptime to reduce code
surface and rely on stdlib validation for malformed input.

perf(posts): batch author lookup to avoid N+1 queries

Previously issued one SELECT per post to fetch its author. Collect
unique author_ids and fetch them in a single query, then join in
memory.
style: normalize whitespace in api/auth.py
test(clamp): cover invalid bounds and below-range inputs

feat(auth)!: require mfa_code on login

BREAKING CHANGE: `login()` now requires an `mfa_code` argument.
Callers must collect and pass the user's MFA code; existing
two-argument calls will fail.
docs(api): document JWT auth header and token lifetime
